title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Trade Attacks and Israel Threatens Beirut
summary_full: An unconfirmed report said Iran would stop participating in negotiations with Washington. In Lebanon, Israel issued an evacuation order for the capital’s southern outskirts, a stronghold of Iran-backed Hezbollah.
summary_public: An unconfirmed report said Iran would stop participating in negotiations with Washington. In Lebanon, Israel issued an evacuation order for the capital’s southern outskirts, a stronghold of Iran-backed Hezbollah.
